title: Ores & Materials for Spartan Weaponry
description: A mod that introduces all the materials necessary for crafting every weapon in Spartan Weaponry.
body:
This mod adds the materials necessary to craft every weapon in Spartan Weaponry, as well as ores for pure metals and recipes for alloys.

![All the content included in the mod neatly laid out.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c4c65decde682c5e4cfc7fcf83df9fd95b0678.png)
## Materials Included:
### Tin
Generates between Y levels 0 and 64.
### Bronze
Crafted from 3 copper and 1 tin ingots.
### Steel
Blasted in a blast furnace from iron ingots.
### Silver
Generates between Y levels -16 and 32.
### Electrum
Crafted from 1 gold and 1 silver ingots.
### Lead
Generates between Y levels -64 and 16.
### Nickel
Generates between Y levels -64 and -16.
### Invar
Crafted from 1 iron and 1 nickel ingots.
### Constantan
Crafted from 1 copper and 1 nickel ingots.
### Platinum
Generates between Y levels -64 and -16.
### Aluminum
Generates between Y levels 32 and 80 in savanna and jungle biomes.

_This mod is not endorsed by or affiliated with Spartan Weaponry or its creator in any way._

_The strict license is due to people having previously stolen and reposted my mods without my permission. You are free to use this mod in your modpacks here on Modrinth. For any other inquiry, please contact me through the Discord link provided._
